metadata.title: Spanish Fruits
metadata.description: Common fruits in Spanish with usage examples.

sentences.original: Como una manzana roja cada día.
sentences.translation: I eat a red apple every day.

sentences.original: La manzana es una fruta muy dulce.
sentences.translation: The apple is a very sweet fruit.

sentences.original: El plátano es de color amarillo.
sentences.translation: The banana is yellow in color.

sentences.original: Me gusta comer un plátano después de correr.
sentences.translation: I like to eat a banana after running.

sentences.original: Bebo un vaso de zumo de naranja.
sentences.translation: I drink a glass of orange juice.

sentences.original: La naranja tiene mucha vitamina C.
sentences.translation: The orange has a lot of vitamin C.

sentences.original: La fresa es roja y pequeña.
sentences.translation: The strawberry is red and small.

sentences.original: Preparo un postre con fresas y nata.
sentences.translation: I prepare a dessert with strawberries and cream.

sentences.original: Comemos doce uvas en Nochevieja.
sentences.translation: We eat twelve grapes on New Year's Eve.

sentences.original: La uva verde es mi favorita.
sentences.translation: The green grape is my favorite.

sentences.original: La piña es una fruta tropical.
sentences.translation: The pineapple is a tropical fruit.

sentences.original: Cortamos la piña en rodajas.
sentences.translation: We cut the pineapple into slices.

sentences.original: El limón tiene un sabor muy ácido.
sentences.translation: The lemon has a very sour taste.

sentences.original: Pongo un poco de limón en mi té.
sentences.translation: I put a little bit of lemon in my tea.

sentences.original: La sandía es perfecta para el verano.
sentences.translation: The watermelon is perfect for summer.

sentences.original: Esta sandía es muy grande y pesada.
sentences.translation: This watermelon is very big and heavy.

sentences.original: La pera está madura y jugosa.
sentences.translation: The pear is ripe and juicy.

sentences.original: Compré una pera en el mercado.
sentences.translation: I bought a pear at the market.

sentences.original: El mango es muy dulce y sabroso.
sentences.translation: The mango is very sweet and tasty.

sentences.original: Me encanta el helado de mango.
sentences.translation: I love mango ice cream.
